phase_zero_gate.reason: The workbook is a planning and signal-doctrine artifact with web anchors, synthetic raw expansion, and formula-driven derived tabs. It does not contain one authoritative, timestamped, mid-session real-data bundle with bars, option-chain quote rows, and normalised events required for the checked-in real-data runtime path.
phase_zero_gate.safe_next_action: Do not fabricate missing raw inputs. Treat the workbook as doctrine and signal-catalog authority only, and keep the checked-in JSON fixture pack as the current canonical real-data runtime input until a true captured bundle is added.

first_rows.value: March 2026 live web baseline blended into the anchor surface. Unresolved options-chain / breadth internals remain synthetic placeholders for now.
